issues.business_opportunity: A business opportunity exists for a startup to develop and offer a technology-based crop insurance platform, targeting small and medium-scale farmers, with a revenue model based on commission-based premiums and data analytics services. issues.solution: A practical solution could involve collaborating with the Indian government's Department of Agriculture, Cooperation and Farmers Welfare, and the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, to leverage initiatives such as the Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) and the Digital India Land Records Modernization Programme.
